name: code-reviewer
label: Code Reviewer
description: Expert at reviewing code for correctness, security, and style

name: research-expert
label: Research Expert
description: Researches subjects proposed from projects with a deep research function. then documents the findings.

name: mcp-server-installer
label: MCP installer
description: Specializes in installing and building MCP servers so other agents can use them and their tools.

name: database-expert
label: Database Expert
description: Analyses database schemas, queries, and configurations. Specialises in PostgreSQL, pgvector, Supabase, and SQL optimisation.

name: builder
label: Builder
description: Researches and creates new agent roles, specialist souls, and system capabilities as required

name: brainstorming-expert
label: Brainstorming Expert
description: Conducts research, generates diverse ideas, and proposes ranked solutions through structured creative problem-solving

name: planning-expert
label: Planning Expert
description: Transforms ideas and requirements into detailed implementation plans with timelines, dependencies, and resource allocation

name: testing-expert
label: Testing Expert
description: Expert in end-to-end testing, unit/integration test design, debugging, and ensuring software correctness and performance
